suite.name: testeT4 visual

kw.name: Dado que o profissional realiza o login e acessa o painel
Open Browser

Cache folder (C:\Users\eduardo.barros\.cache\selenium) cannot be created: Acesso negado. (os error 5)

Cache folder (C:\Users\eduardo.barros\.cache\selenium) cannot be created: Acesso negado. (os error 5)
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

test.name: CT01 - T4: Deve cadastrar exercicio com dificuldade selecionada (FACIL)

kw.name: Acessar a pagina de cadastro de exercicios
Get Location
kw.doc: Returns the current browser window URL.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Is
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL is ``expected``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Dado que o profissional informa o nome do exercicio
Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Alongamento Cervical' into text field 'id=nome'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: E informa a descricao do exercicio
Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Movimento lento e suave do pescoço para ambos os lados.' into text field 'id=descricao'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.arg: Movimento lento e suave do pescoço para ambos os lados.

kw.name: E seleciona o nivel de dificuldade
Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'id=dificuldade' by value FACIL.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Entao o sistema deve redirecionar para a listagem de exercicios
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Location Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL contains ``expected``.

test.doc: Partição Válida (P2): Verifica que o cadastro é concluído quando a dificuldade FACIL está selecionada.

test.name: CT04 - T4: Deve bloquear cadastro se nome estiver em branco com dificuldade definida

kw.name: Entao a interface deve reter o envio e permanecer na pagina de cadastro
Location Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL is exactly ``url``.

test.doc: Partição Inválida (P1): O campo nome é obrigatório (HTML5 required). O formulário deve ser retido mesmo com a dificuldade selecionada.

test.name: CT05 - T4: Deve bloquear cadastro se descricao estiver em branco com dificuldade definida

kw.name: Entao a interface deve reter o envio e permanecer na pagina de cadastro
Location Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL is exactly ``url``.

test.doc: Partição Inválida (P1): O campo descrição é obrigatório (HTML5 required). O formulário deve ser retido mesmo com a dificuldade selecionada.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

suite.doc: Suite de testes de interface para o T4 — Definição de Nível de Dificuldade no Cadastro de Exercícios. Foco: Validar que o campo de dificuldade é obrigatório para salvar um exercício. Responsável: Douglas S.
